name: My Summer Sweetheart
overview: After a car accident caused by a conspiracy, ambitious heiress Zhu Jinhao loses her memory and, with the help of her rescuer Lin Qingyi, uncovers the truth while an unexpected romance blossoms between them.

trailers.title: 《我的夏日甜心》预告上线！失忆女霸总迎来她的夏日蜜恋？｜My Summer Sweetheart｜MangoTV Short Play
